name: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Check Cashing USA (Miami)
description_short: At 3598 NW 27th Ave in Miami, FL, CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Check Cashing USA (Miami) provides quick cryptocurrency and cash services inside Check Cashing USA.
description_long:
The CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Check Cashing USA (Miami) location at 3598 NW 27th Ave in Miami is set up inside Check Cashing USA, a trusted financial services hub in Miami, FL. This Miami location operates with convenient hours: Monday–Thursday 8AM–8PM, Friday 8AM–9PM, Saturday 8AM–8PM, Sunday 10AM–5PM.

At this Miami location, you can buy and sell Bitcoin directly from the ATM, make cash withdrawals, or use Check Cashing USA's full range of financial services. Call +1 773-800-0106 to ask about current Bitcoin rates, verification requirements, or to confirm the ATM is in service before your visit.

If you're in Miami looking for a quick way to convert cash to Bitcoin or vice versa, this Check Cashing USA location offers that without requiring a bank account. Bring a valid ID and expect the transaction to complete in minutes. CoinFlip operates ATMs across multiple cities, but this Miami branch is your neighborhood option.
pros: Extended store hours (8:00 AM–9:00 PM most days) make cryptocurrency purchasing accessible during convenient times
24/7 customer support available via phone (1-877-757-2646) and email for transaction issues
CoinFlip Account system allows registered users to transact up to $15,000 per day with streamlined kiosk experience
Co-location with Check Cashing USA provides access to multiple financial services at the same address
Mobile CoinFlip Crypto Wallet can be downloaded in advance to prepare for faster transactions
Multiple nearby CoinFlip locations in Miami area (6 additional locations listed) provide backup options
Same-day cryptocurrency delivery claimed for purchased Bitcoin and other supported cryptocurrencies
cons: No fee schedule disclosed on location page; customer must contact support to understand transaction costs before purchasing
Transaction limits stated as 'up to $15,000 per day (limits may vary by location)' creates uncertainty about actual limits at this specific Miami location
Limited cryptocurrency selection not specified on page; unclear which coins beyond Bitcoin are supported at this location
Requires cryptocurrency wallet setup before or at time of transaction, adding friction for first-time users unfamiliar with crypto wallets
Bitcoin ATM transactions involve volatility risk and irreversibility that aren't explicitly addressed on the location page
best_for: Customers who prefer cash-based cryptocurrency purchases over online exchanges due to privacy or comfort concerns
Individuals already using Check Cashing USA services who want to add cryptocurrency purchases to their visit
Bitcoin enthusiasts in Miami seeking physical kiosk access without needing a traditional bank account or online brokerage
diagnosis: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM is best for customers seeking a physical, cash-based way to purchase cryptocurrency without online banking accounts or exchange accounts, particularly those comfortable using digital wallets. The primary caveat is that this is a specialized cryptocurrency purchasing tool, not a general financial service, with undisclosed fees and location-specific limits that require direct contact to clarify before any transaction.
services: Bitcoin purchase with cash at physical kiosk
Purchase of other cryptocurrencies (specific coins not detailed on page)
CoinFlip Account creation for registered users with elevated daily transaction limits
Mobile CoinFlip Crypto Wallet download and creation
Receipt generation and transaction history access
Same-day cryptocurrency delivery after cash purchase
Co-location convenience with Check Cashing USA services
Transaction status checking through CoinFlip Account dashboard
